sourceMovie.title: Superman
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Superman (2025) as a science fiction theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The science fiction and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Avengers
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Superman clicked for you, The Avengers (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Superman clicked for you, Guardians of the Galaxy (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Superman?
faq.answer: Try The Avengers, Guardians of the Galaxy, Captain America: Civil War—each shares DNA with Superman while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Superman?
faq.answer: Superman (2025) is best described as Science Fiction, Adventure, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Superman part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Superman (DCU) Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
